02 / 12 — ALTAN NEXUS

Orientation & Atrium

Solar strategies and the atrium as the spatial heart.

Back to Portfolio ALTAN NEXUS — 02 / 12
Environmental Strategy

Orientation
& Atrium

The building's orientation is calibrated to the path of the sun — the atrium is a solar machine as much as a social space.

The primary axes are rotated to align the main facade with the summer solstice sunset over Vodno. This single decision shapes the building's character — the way light enters the atrium, the angle of the loggias, the rhythm of the facade fins.

The central atrium rises the full height of the podium. It functions as a bioclimatic lung — drawing warm air upward in summer, capturing solar gain in winter, and providing natural daylight to all internal-facing spaces.

Contextual site analysis — sun, wind, terrain & urban plan

ENSite analysis combining solar path, wind rose, topographic section and urban plan.
SQAnalizë siti me rrugën diellore, rozën e erës, seksionin topografik dhe planin urban.
МКАнализа на локацијата со сончева патека, ружа на ветерот и урбан план.

"The atrium is not a lobby — it is a sky. A vertical garden threaded with light, sound, and the movement of people."

Urban Position

Skopje — Urban Strategy

Skopje urban strategy — project location within the city

ENProject positioned near the Stone Bridge, Old Bazaar, and Vardar River at the civic heart of Skopje.
SQProjekti i vendosur pranë Urës së Gurit, Çarshisë dhe Lumit Vardar.
МКПроектот позициониран кај Камениот мост, Чаршијата и реката Вардар.

Land use — zoning plan around the site

ENSite at the intersection of residential, business, and public open space zones.
SQSiti në kryqëzimin e zonave banesore, biznesit dhe hapësirave publike.
МКЛокацијата на пресекот на станбени, деловни и јавни зони.

Vardar river connection — proximity, microclimate, water impact

ENDiagram showing the building's relationship with the Vardar — microclimate, proximity, and flood awareness.
SQDiagramë e marrëdhënies me Vardar — mikroklima, afërsia dhe vetëdijesimi për përmbytjet.
МКДијаграм на врската со Вардар — микроклима, близина и свест за поплави.
Site Analysis

Wind, Views & Topography

Wind & microclimate analysis

ENPrevailing winds from the river corridor channel cool air through the site.
SQErërat dominante nga korridori i lumit kanalizojnë ajrin e freskët nëpër sit.
МКПреовладувачките ветрови од речниот коридор канализираат свеж воздух низ теренот.

Visual axes & views — nature and urban panoramas

ENPrimary visual axis connects the building to the green zone and the open urban landscape.
SQAksi kryesor vizual lidh ndërtesën me zonën e gjelbër dhe panoramën urbane.
МКГлавната визуелна оска ја поврзува зградата со зелената зона и урбаната панорама.

Terrain analysis — topography, slope and stability

ENColour-coded slope analysis: gentle gradients at the building footprint, steeper edges toward the riverbank.
SQAnalizë e pjerrësisë me ngjyra: gradient të buta tek ndërtesa, më të pjerta drejt bregut.
МКАнализа на нагибот во бои: благи градиенти кај зградата, пострми кон брегот.
Daylight Strategy

Natural Light Analysis

Daylighting analysis — floor plan with direct and indirect light zones

ENFloor plan showing zones of direct sunlight and diffuse indirect light, centred on the atrium as optimal daylighting core.
SQPlani tregon zonat me dritë direkte dhe indirekte, të qendërzuara te atriumi si bërthamë optimale e ndriçimit.
МКПланот покажува зони со директна и индиректна светлина, центрирани на атриумот како оптимално јадро на осветлување.
